metadata.title: VTA Route 27 — Corridor Path and Candidate Stops

properties.name: Route 27 corridor path
properties.description: Stitched road-network path between anchor waypoints
properties.source: OSMnx Dijkstra shortest-path or straight-line fallback

properties.name: Winchester Transit Center
properties.note: VTA LRT transfer point; Route 27 northern terminus. OSM node ~5770926983 (Winchester Blvd & Lark Ave transit plaza).

properties.name: Los Gatos Blvd & Lark Ave
properties.note: Major signalized intersection. Route 27 turns south onto Los Gatos Blvd. AADT ~23,000 (Caltrans PeMS 2022).

properties.name: Los Gatos Blvd & Blossom Hill Rd
properties.note: Key N-S / E-W junction. Blossom Hill Rd corridor begins here. Signal with bus pull-out per VTA field survey notes (2019).

properties.name: Los Gatos Blvd & Shannon Rd
properties.note: Mid-corridor residential transition. Existing VTA stop per GTFS stops.txt (stop_id approx 2699 area).

properties.name: Los Gatos Blvd & Samaritan Dr
properties.note: Southern residential cluster. Transition from Los Gatos Blvd to Los Gatos-Almaden Rd alignment.

properties.name: Los Gatos-Almaden Rd & Main St
properties.note: Route transitions from LG-Almaden onto Main St approaching downtown. OSM way ~Los Gatos-Almaden Rd, approaches N. Santa Cruz Ave fork.

properties.name: N. Santa Cruz Ave & Main St (Downtown Los Gatos)
properties.note: Highest-density pedestrian zone; commercial core. FTA transit-oriented development node. Existing VTA stops on both directions of N. Santa Cruz Ave.

properties.name: Blossom Hill Rd & University Ave
properties.note: Route 27 turns east onto Blossom Hill Rd after downtown loop. Gateway to Union SD corridor.

properties.name: Blossom Hill Rd & Camden Ave
properties.note: Major signalized intersection. Camden Ave is a primary N-S arterial (AADT ~18,000, Caltrans 2022). Transfer point between Route 27 and north-south services.

properties.name: Blossom Hill Rd & Meridian Ave
properties.note: Eastern end of study-area corridor. Blossom Hill LRT station ~0.4 mi further east. Meridian Ave is a major arterial (AADT ~35,000).

properties.source: VTA GTFS stops.txt (parent station PS_WINC area)
